meaning: n.语言,语言文学,术语,语言表达能力,(运用语言的)方式、能力、风格,[自](机器)代码 /n.语言/国家
examples: Her language was not very ladylike.
The country's official language is Spanish.
You no longer need to know HTML, the computer publishing language, to build a basic site.
Both committees are working with the Treasury Department on the specifics of the language.
